raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "declaring a deliberate shift toward evidence-based evaluation over emotionally driven assessment",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker generates predictions that can be tested",
    "actual outcomes are distinguishable from feared outcomes",
    "fear has previously served as a reference point for evaluating predictions",
    "a choice between these reference points is available and actionable"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; presents a clear, non-contradictory preference between two distinct evaluative standards",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker must have reliable access to observable outcomes and sufficient self-awareness to recognize when fear is being used as the comparator",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the speaker continues to interpret outcomes through a fear-filter while claiming to use empirical results, or actual events remain inaccessible or misrecorded"
}
